name: Clawwarden Runtime
description: Durably enqueue OpenClaw lifecycle events for unattended Clawwarden processing.

scriptPath.description: Optional absolute path to scripts/control_plane.py. Defaults to the copy bundled with this repository.

capturePrompt.description: Persist clipped raw prompts in the local event database. Disabled by default because prompts can contain private data.

captureSummary.description: Persist clipped assistant summaries in the local event database. Disabled by default because summaries can contain private data.
